description: reporting plugin — inject the lean-reporting output contract on every prompt, re-pulse it every Nth tool call, and block a contract-violating final message at Stop (forcing a compact rewrite)

hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/brevity-reminder.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ brevity-reminder DISARMED — contract file unreadable.'
bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/contract-pulse.sh" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ contract-pulse DISARMED — hook failed to execute."}'
